titleStmt.title: SII 39.75: original edition by K. Karuppiah
No. 75. (A.R. No. 75 of 1916.) TIRUKKĀḶAKKUḌI, TIRUPPATTUR TALUK, RAMNAD DISTRICT. KAKŌḶANĀTH TEMPLE-ON THE WEST WALL OF THE SAME SHRINE.

summary.p: The beginning of the inscription is lost. This inscription speaks about the sale of land to the temple of Tirukkōlakkuḍi by the ūrār of Vēlaṅguḍi. The land here sold is the same as that referred to in No. 50 of 1916, above.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
tevaṟkku pūṅkuṉṟa nāṭṭu
Ūrāka yicaiñca Ūru
m Ū kiḻ Iṟaiyili tirunāmattukāṇi
vilaippirāṇam paṇṇik koṭutta paricā
vatu Eṅkaḷ Ū (ō)ru colvācakap
paraiyan kuṭikkāṭu kuḷamum Ūrkuḷamum
vayalum varampaḻiñcu kāṭāykkiṭan
Ivayalukku Iṟaipūṇṭu Iṟukkup
paṭiyāle Ikkuṭikāṭu Ūrañcāti I(ṟaiyili)yā
kakkoḷviro koḷviroveṉṟu pala(ta)ram muṟ
kūṟap piṟkūṟikoḷveṉe(ṉ)ṟa Iṉṉāyanār Āticaṇ
ṭeśvaradevaṟku Emmila Icaiñcu vilaipporuḷu
kku viṟpataṟku Icaiñcu Ūrañcāti Iṟaiyili tirunā
mattukkāṇiyāka vilaikkuṟa viṟṟu poru(ḷavuk koṇṭu)
vilaipramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭutta(paṭi) Āticaṇṭeśvaradevaṟ
ku velaṅ(k)kuṭi Ūravarom Ippaṭi viṟṟa Ikkuṭikkāṭṭukku peruṉāṉ
kellaiyāvatu kīḻpāṟkellai coṟuṇṇikkuḷattu kīḻkaraikku meṟku
m teṉpāṟkellai rvait teṉvarampukku vaṭa
kkum melpāṟkellai pparuppukku ki(ḻak)kum vaṭapāṟkellai muṉ
kkuḷattu
ṭpaṭṭa nilamum na(t)tam kuḷama
maṟṟum Eppeṟpaṭṭanavum Uḷppaṭa Iṟaiyili tirunāmattukkāṇiyāka viṟṟu
vilaippirāmaṇam paṇṇikkuṭuttom Uṭaiyār tirukkoḷa(k)kuṭi Uṭai
ya nāyaṉāṟāti caṇṭeśvaradevaṟku velaṅkuṭi Ūrāka Icainta Ūr(o) m Ippaṭi
Oru colvācakap peraiyaṉ kuṭikkāṭṭil vayalukku nirreṟṟi
kaṭai tiṟantu pāyvatākavum mu
ṭum Itile pāyavum Ippaṭi cammatittu cattirātitta(vaṟ c)elva
vārkaḷākavum ñcāti Iṟaiyili tirunāmattukkāṇi vilaippiramāṇam paṇṇi
kkuṭuttom Uṭaiyār tirukkoḷakkuṭi Uṭaiya nāyaṉār Āticaṇṭeśvara(te)vaṟku velaṅ
kuṭi Ūrāka Icaiñca Ūrom
damaged
Digital edition of SII 39.75 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
